meaning: adj.野生的,未驯服的,凶猛的,野兽的
examples: A feral sweet pea clings to it for support.
Boys and girls stuck in time, ageless, feral as a pack of wild dogs.
Quaritch turns from gazing out at the wall of forest, displaying a feral grin.
It also signaled the eruption of Toshiro Mifune, the movie's feral bandit, into stardom.
Mr. CAMPBELL: When they go into a feral state, they absolutely trash the place.
